items.name: Love Begins with Goodbye
items.desc: After regaining her sight, Emily Green discovers her boyfriend Daniel Bennett's betrayal with his first love. items.name: No Longer His Stand-In Wife(Dubbed)
items.desc: Lily Wright, 10 years younger than Lucas Walker, discovers that he sees her as a substitute for his true love, Grace Lee. Devastated, she divorces and vanishes. Lucas realizes too late that she's the one he loves, but she refuses another chance. Finding her with a new boyfriend breaks him.

items.name: After I Left, She Broke
items.desc: Deaf orphan Noah, starved for love, meets Sophia—who loves him passionately. Before their wedding, he secretly restores his hearing to hear her vows. But he discovers she has been cheating with his assistant Liam—outwardly devoted, secretly craving power and provoking him.

items.name: Mobster's Cinderella
items.desc: Frank saves Angela from a bully and finds that she looks like his late lover, Kelly. They both fall in love at first sight. Angela feels disheartened and runs away from Frank when she learns she is just a substitute for Kelly. Will Angela grant Frank a second chance? Will Frank realize his true love?

items.name: The Ninth Divorce
items.desc: Sophia loved Noah for eight years, but their marriage cycled through divorce and remarriage due to his first love’s interference. After their ninth divorce, she left the country and married Lucas, the wealthy heir, in a marriage of convenience. His gentleness turned their contract into true love.

items.name: Mistaken Surrogacy, Christmas Destiny
items.desc: She gave everything for love, only to be betrayed while pregnant. Four months along, Rose is cast out by her cheating husband. But the baby belongs to Brad, a magnetic billionaire. Rose and Brad strike a deal: a flash marriage, shared revenge. Fighting side by side, vengeance turns into tender love.

items.name: Fed Up With My Husband
items.desc: Song Wanhe secretly loved Fu Yanci and arranged their marriage after his breakup. Three years later, she still couldn't win his heart. When his first love Xie Liuli returned, he abandoned her medical appointment for Xie's call. Heartbroken, Song Wanhe demanded a divorce.

items.name: Rewrite Our Love Story
items.desc: In her past life, Su Jiani secretly loved Chi Yu for seven years, only to end up in an unhappy marriage. Reborn in high school, she vows to stay away and focus on her studies. But Chi Yu is reborn too—and this time, he pursues her with sincerity. Together, they heal old wounds and find true love.

highlight.description: In her past life, Su Jiani secretly {{love}}d Chi Yu for seven years, only to end up in an unhappy marriage. Reborn in high school, she vows to stay away and focus on her studies. But Chi Yu is reborn too—and this time, he pursues her with sincerity. Together, they heal old wounds and find true {{love}}.
highlight.title: Rewrite Our {{Love}} Story

items.name: The Disguised Bride: Love Realized
items.desc: Orphaned friends Emily and Sarah pose as the Carter brothers' first loves to marry into wealth. Emily, secretly tough, plays the fragile wife to rebellious Michael. When the real first love returns, they flee with cash—but are caught. A mutual secret crush unravels, and fake love turns real.

items.name: Fated to My Billionaire Call Boy
items.desc: Claire wants to have a baby to give her ailing grandmother something to live for. When Claire’s cheating husband leaves her, she hires a call boy to make a baby with her. She doesn’t know the call boy is actually billionaire Dominic Bridges who is in love with her and will do anything to get her. But her scheming rival, Gina, will do anything to keep them apart.

items.name: Farewell to My Unrequited Love
items.desc: Li Jiaxin deeply loves her husband Jiang Yan, but he neither loves nor trusts her. When she's diagnosed with late-stage stomach cancer, Bai Mu, who cares for her, urges her to let go of Jiang Yan. Yet, years of love aren't so easy to simply abandon.

highlight.description: Li Jiaxin deeply {{love}}s her husband Jiang Yan, but he neither {{love}}s nor trusts her. When she's diagnosed with late-stage stomach cancer, Bai Mu, who cares for her, urges her to let go of Jiang Yan. Yet, years of {{love}} aren't so easy to simply abandon.

items.name: Hired to Save Him, Fell in Love
items.desc: To save her grandfather, Qi Miao is hired by Mrs. Ji to pose as caregiver to paralyzed Ji Huaiyuan and restore his will to live. What begins as pretense turns into genuine love. But on their wedding day, the Ji family's illegitimate son Ji Mingliang exposes the truth that she was hired.

items.name: Divorce Me, Regret Forever
items.desc: Nicole Wilson loved Thomas Parker for three years, but when his first love returned, a divorce ended it all. Pregnant and heartbroken, she left. After seeing the truth. Thomas Parker begged in the rain. She left with Ryan Cooper—proud and done.

items.name: ATM Revolt, Family Frenzy
items.desc: Reborn as Jiang Xinyao, the love-sick heiress vows revenge on her former lover who once stole her fortune and took her life. With a sinister smile, she plots, "This time, I'll ruin you!" As her vengeance unfolds, she unexpectedly finds true love. But the most astonishing twist? Her devoted admirer is none other than the scion of Beijing's elite!
